steps.title: Factor the quadratic
steps.content:
Find two numbers that multiply to $-20$ and add to $1$. Those numbers are $5$ and $-4$, so:
$$x^2+x-20=(x+5)(x-4)$$

steps.title: Choose the positive solution
steps.content: Set each factor equal to zero: $$(x+5)(x-4)=0$$ $$x=-5\quad\text{or}\quad x=4$$ Since $a>0$, use the positive solution. The answer is 4.
